plugins.name: cohort-analysis
plugins.description: Interactive cohort analysis dashboard — engagement retention, revenue/GP cohorts, CAC/LTV payback. Point at CSV, Excel, or a database and get live charts.

plugins.name: general-manager
plugins.description: Autonomous agent orchestrator — delegate complex tasks to a manager that spawns sub-agents, monitors progress, and reports back
